task.objective: Extract query functions into domain-specific files
task.motivation: Domain separation makes it easy to find and modify related queries. Each file should be under 400 lines and focused on a single domain.

constraints.constraint: Extract one domain at a time, verify build after each
Maintain all exports through lib/db.ts during migration
Keep internal functions (extractErrorType, etc.) with their consumers

extraction_order.note: Extract in this order to minimize dependency issues. Run `npm run build` after each extraction.

domain.name: metrics.ts
domain.functions: - getDashboardMetrics - getTrendData - getFailureTrendData - getBranches - getSuites - getSlowestTests - getSuitePassRates - getReliabilityScore
domain.reason: All metric queries, used by dashboard

domain.name: executions.ts
domain.reason: Core execution queries, used by other domains

domain.name: classification.ts
domain.reason: Contains internal functions that must stay with getFailureClassification. Self-contained once extracted.

domain.name: ingestion.ts
domain.reason: Multiple dependencies including flakiness.ts. Extract last to avoid circular deps.

step.name: Extract Each Domain
step.action:
For each domain file (in order above):
1. Create the new file in lib/db/ 2. Copy relevant functions from lib/db.ts 3. Add required imports at top 4. Export all public functions 5. In lib/db.ts: - Add import from new file - Add re-export: `export { fn1, fn2 } from "./db/filename"` - Keep the original function (for now) 6. Run `npm run build` 7. If build passes, remove original function from lib/db.ts 8. Run `npm run build` again

step.name: Example: Extract api-keys.ts
Handle Internal Functions
Verify After Each Extraction
step.action:
After each domain file: ```bash npm run build npm run dev # Quick test that dashboard loads ```
If errors occur, check: - Missing imports - Circular dependencies - Type mismatches

verification.check: All 10 domain files created in lib/db/

next_phase.description: Move getQueriesForOrg to index.ts and delete original db.ts

mandatory_final_step.action: UPDATE docs/prompts/db-abstraction-refactor/status.md with: - Date, Phase, Status - Domain files created (list all) - Any issues encountered - Next step link
